text:
"Pride" may refer to the following:
Selim Bradley, the son of the Führer of Amestris who is later revealed to be a Homunculus and the embodiment of some of Father's Pride in the original manga and 2009 anime.
King Bradley, the Führer of Amestris who is later revealed to be a Homunculus created by Dante in the 2003 anime series.
